_comment: HUMAN-OWNED. Strict compilerOptions base. The root web-ui/tsconfig.json shim extends this file. Meta-invariant apps/tests/invariants/test_webui_invariants_wired.py runs `tsc --showConfig` on the live tree and asserts every flag in KNOWN_SENTINELS is set as expected. Do not add overrides here to silence failures — fix the calling code. Successive TS-XX items (starting with TS-01) fill this in.
